Description: Pre-Field Preparation — Review Construction Survey Records and IFC Drawings
Notes: Obtain/review DEL-008-03 control data; review IFC drawings for all project components; review contractor as-built markups; prepare field survey plan; confirm datum; confirm site access logistics

SourceSection: Step 2.1 — Establish or verify survey control
Notes: Occupy or tie to DEL-008-03 control points; check closure to confirm control integrity; re-establish if control disturbed per Guidance P-2 contingency

Description: Field Survey — Topographic Survey of Completed Site
Notes: Building addition exterior corners and finished floor elevation; gravel driving surface edges/limits; grading and drainage features; existing shop reference points

SourceSection: Steps 2.3-2.4 — Collect infrastructure and additional features
Notes: Cistern access points and fill connections; septic holding tank lid and footprint; utility tie-in points (gas/electrical/communications); mud sump/wash bay drain; any additional material features identified during field review

Description: Field Survey — Field Notes and Documentation
Notes: Date; weather; instrument type/serial; crew members; control points occupied; features collected; anomalies/deviations observed

Description: Office Reduction — Data Processing and Adjustment
SourceSection: Steps 3.1-3.2 — Download/process field data and adjustment
Notes: Download field data; check for blunders/outliers; perform adjustment and closure check on control network; confirm accuracy meets agreed standard
Plan view with all surveyed features; coordinate/dimension/elevation annotations; IFC drawing references; title block with project name/legal description/date/surveyor/datum

Description: Construction Verification — IFC Comparison and Deviation Analysis
SourceSection: Step 3.4 — Compare as-built data against IFC drawings
Notes: Identify deviations (position/elevation/extent); classify deviations (within tolerance/minor/material); prepare deviation table/markup if material deviations found
Survey scope and methodology; datum and coordinate system; control points and provenance; accuracy statement; construction verification summary; list of artifacts delivered

Review drawings/report for completeness; check coordinate/elevation data consistency; confirm datum reference stated and consistent; confirm material deviations documented; confirm deliverable format meets Owner requirements

Description: Submission to Owner and Revision Cycle
Notes: Compile complete deliverable package; submit to Owner/County PM; respond to review comments; obtain written Owner acceptance
PM oversight of as-built survey deliverable. Hours from Level_of_Effort.csv (R-01; 6 hr)
Cost estimator support. Hours from Level_of_Effort.csv (R-08; 4 hr)
